flags.what: No visible keyboard-focus indicator is defined on buttons, nav links, or the email input (its outline is removed on focus), and the smallest tap targets — the basket close button and nav links — fall below the 44px mobile size.
flags.fix: Add a clear focus ring (at least 2px and 3:1 contrast) to every interactive element, keep the email input's focus visible, and pad the close button and nav links to a 44px touch area on phones.

flags.what: The add-to-basket success label and toast use a literal check glyph as the confirmation icon rather than the inline check SVG used elsewhere.
flags.fix: Render the confirmation check as the same inline SVG used in the stock indicator, for consistency.

recommendation: Distinctive, warm, on-brief work that clears the AI-slop test and is safe to approve. Before or with the live build, add a visible keyboard-focus indicator across all controls (the one accessibility gap on the main path), complete the async-failure states the static mockup skipped — newsletter success/invalid-email feedback and a basket/add error path — and nudge the smallest mobile tap targets (basket close, nav links) up to 44px. None of this blocks approval; it is the punch list for the worker.
assessed: current/index.html (storefront mockup) + design-system.md; no rendered screenshot present, judged from fully-specified source (OKLCH tokens, clamp type, explicit 700px/1040px media queries, live state markup)
